final_answer:
Yes, for Phase 2 scope this is complete; I did not find remaining partial implementation.

Why this matters: validator-join admission is now fully native-shaped (not bridge-event-shaped), which is required for the final Gold Chain validator architecture.

Confirmed (read-only):
- `MsgValidatorJoin` no longer has `tx_hash/log_index/block_number/nonce` in [tx.proto](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/proto/giltconsensusv2/stake/tx.proto:29).
- Generated types match that schema in [tx.pb.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/stake/types/tx.pb.go:36) and [tx.pulsar.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/api/giltconsensusv2/stake/tx.pulsar.go:4315).
- Regen fallout paths that were touched are consistent (field-name callsites + amino registration lengths), including [params.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/chainmanager/types/params.go:27), [grpc_query.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/clerk/keeper/grpc_query.go:259), and codec registrations in [checkpoint codec](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/checkpoint/types/codec.go:14), [chainmanager codec](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/chainmanager/types/codec.go:14), [milestone codec](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/milestone/types/codec.go:14).

What should be done next:
1. Proceed to the next planned validator-parity phase (your Phase 3 scope).  
2. Keep the same hard gate: run module checks after each phase before moving on.
prompt: Read only task, don't change code. Go through fine tooth comb of what you just implemented and check for gaps or partial implementation and report back please. Dont be overzealous and go on tangents, remain in the confines of the scope of this task, there might be times where you might have to say all done nothing left, which would also be an acceptable response
